title: Bikemaxxing
description: An interactive bike-share visualization that maps Boston station activity, routes, and time-based departure and arrival patterns.

title: DSC 106 Portfolio
description: A personal portfolio website for DSC 106 that showcases projects, GitHub data, navigation, theming, and reusable JavaScript rendering.

title: DSC 106 Project 2
description: A DSC 106 data visualization project built in a Jupyter Notebook workflow for exploring, analyzing, and presenting data.

title: ESG Portfolio Optimizer
description: A finance project developed for SIG that explores portfolio optimization with ESG considerations and investment analysis.

title: NBA Draft Predictor
description: A predictive modeling project that uses basketball and draft-related data to estimate future NBA draftee performance.

title: Rate The Review
description: An NLP project that predicts ratings from recipe review text and explores how language patterns relate to user scores.

title: Image and Audio Processing Toolkit
description: A Python toolkit with reusable classes and modules for image processing, audio processing, and computational media experiments.

title: Taylor Swift Song Recommender
description: A music data project that explores recommendation ideas using Taylor Swift song information and notebook-based analysis.

title: Git Exercise: Conflicts
description: A GitHub skills exercise focused on understanding merge conflicts, repository history, and collaborative version control workflows.

title: GitHub Profile Repository
description: A profile repository used to customize and maintain public GitHub profile content, documentation, and personal project links.

title: Introduction to GitHub
description: A GitHub skills repository for practicing core repository concepts, commits, branches, pull requests, and project collaboration.

title: Resolve Merge Conflicts
description: A GitHub skills repository for learning how merge conflicts happen and how to resolve competing file changes cleanly.

title: Review Pull Requests
description: A GitHub skills repository focused on reviewing pull requests, giving feedback, and understanding collaborative code review.
